title: Loops with at most one iteration should be refactored
description: When a loop only executes at most once, it is an indicator of potential inefficiency or misunderstanding of the language. This rule identifies loops that should be refactored.
message: Loop with at most one iteration found.
recommendation: Consider replacing the loop with a single statement or restructuring the code.
why_is_this_an_issue: Loops with at most one iteration may indicate a misunderstanding of the language or potential inefficiency.
how_to_fix: Replace the loop with a single statement or restructure the code.

logic.logic.new_check_type_doc: Checks if the loop's expression value is exactly 1.

metadata.title: Loops with at most one iteration should be refactored
